_comment_layers: All v2 layers enabled by default. Set to false to disable individual layers.
_comment_config: The replacements, reverseMap, toolRenames, and propRenames arrays below show the defaults. You only need config.json if you want to customize them.
_comment_toolRenames: Tool name renames are applied as quoted replacements throughout the entire body. The defaults cover known legacy runtime tools. Add entries for any custom tools your runtime adds.
_comment_propRenames: Property renames handle runtime-specific schema properties. Add entries for any custom properties.
_comment_runtime_template: See config.runtime.example.json for a sanitized multi-runtime compatibility template copied from the current local deployment.
